prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document primarily references processes under the Planning Act 2008, which is applicable to England and Wales for Nationally Significant Infrastructure Projects. Scotland operates under its own planning legislation and frameworks, meaning this guidance does not apply directly to Scottish development consent processes.
